description: Motion DNA for the first 50 Familiars candidates. These are not final generation prompts; they define how each pet must move so the pack does not collapse into generic jumps, waves, and walks.

pets.name: Zentri
pets.locomotion: Angular origami stride; legs place like compass points while folded tail counterbalances.
pets.hoverOrJump: Paper-spring compression; tail fan opens slightly at peak, then refolds.
pets.workLoop: Beak scans, cyan fold ticks, wing facets sort invisible product intent.
pets.waiting: One folded wing opens like an approval tab while the head tilts toward the user.
pets.failed: Neck crease collapses and chest facet caves like a draft that needs refolding.
pets.review: Long-neck inspection, narrowed eye, one careful foot adjustment.

pets.name: Terminal Ghost
pets.locomotion: No legs; it advances in short prompt snaps as if characters are being typed.
pets.hoverOrJump: Line-execute pop: body rises like a submitted terminal command and settles with cursor blink.
pets.workLoop: Prompt-eye cadence, attached cyan cursor pulse, tiny body-edge terminal sparks.
pets.waiting: Body stills into a waiting prompt, blinking slower than idle.
pets.failed: Body sinks as the prompt rhythm breaks into a nonzero-exit slump.
pets.review: Leans over an invisible command output with one caret eye narrowed.

pets.name: Review Owl
pets.locomotion: Perch-hops and sidesteps, head locked on target while body catches up.
pets.hoverOrJump: Talons tuck for a compact perch-hop; ear tufts bounce once.
pets.workLoop: Eyes scan line by line; wing edge marks a virtual diff margin.
pets.waiting: Patient head tilt almost upside-down, asking for a merge decision.
pets.failed: Ear tufts droop and chest feathers flatten.
pets.review: Signature head rotation into decisive reviewer squint.

pets.name: Bug Hunter
pets.locomotion: Low clustered scuttle, antennae leaning before the body moves.
pets.hoverOrJump: Legs compress under shell; antennae flick up at the peak.
pets.workLoop: Antennae scan, front legs tap, body pivots between invisible evidence points.
pets.waiting: One front leg raises while antennae point at the user for the missing clue.
pets.failed: Antennae droop and the body folds low as if the trail went cold.
pets.review: Antennae form a tight focus angle; front legs brace for close inspection.

pets.name: Bug Searcher
pets.locomotion: Zig-zag search scuttle, each direction change led by antennae.
pets.hoverOrJump: Short probe-hop where the head rises first, then the feet replant in search formation.
pets.workLoop: Sweeps a held or body-attached search focus from side to side without detached icons.
pets.waiting: Freezes mid-search with antennae split, waiting for a path or stack trace.
pets.failed: Search posture collapses inward; antennae cross briefly in confusion.
pets.review: Narrows into a microscope-like stance with body low and antennae parallel.

pets.name: Rubber Duck 2.0
pets.locomotion: Squeaky desk-waddle; beak leads, tail wobbles after each squash.
pets.hoverOrJump: Rubber squeeze-pop: body compresses, pops, then rebounds without ground effects.
pets.workLoop: Listening nods, beak tilt, one skeptical blink as the problem is explained.
pets.waiting: Beak turns directly toward the user and holds patient listening posture.
pets.failed: Deflates slightly with a drooping beak.
pets.review: Beak points at the work like a silent 'say that line again'.

pets.name: Token Vampire
pets.locomotion: Wing-beat flutter; cape corners snap, not leg running.
pets.hoverOrJump: Bat-hop takeoff with one held wingbeat at the top.
pets.workLoop: Attached cyan token accent pulses while cape folds scan the context.
pets.waiting: Hovers with wings held open, staring for more context.
pets.failed: Cape collapses around the body and fangs disappear.
pets.review: Cape frames the face while eyes inspect the token accent.

pets.name: Ladybug Dev
pets.locomotion: Tiny many-leg crawl with shell tilt; spots stay readable.
pets.hoverOrJump: Shell opens just enough for a small lift, then snaps shut.
pets.workLoop: Front legs tap in a terminal rhythm while shell spots blink subtly.
pets.waiting: Front legs pause above the invisible keyboard, asking for the next command.
pets.failed: Shell closes tight and antennae lower.
pets.review: Shell tilts forward and front legs brace like reading a tiny diff.

pets.name: Toffee
pets.locomotion: Tiny prancing steps with soft ear bounce.
pets.hoverOrJump: Excited toy-poodle hop: front paws lift first, ears follow.
pets.workLoop: Head tracks side to side like following an agent task, tail doing two small beats.
pets.waiting: Sits with one paw lifted and ears alert.
pets.failed: Ears droop and the body lowers into a worried sit.
pets.review: Nose points forward, paw half-raised, eyes focused.

pets.name: Rozi
pets.locomotion: Quiet cat steps with tail as the timing anchor.
pets.hoverOrJump: Cat spring: shoulder crouch, tail counter-sweep, soft landing.
pets.workLoop: Tail flicks, eyes narrow, body shifts into a focused loaf-and-rise loop.
pets.waiting: Sits perfectly still except for one tail-tip question flick.
pets.failed: Ears flatten and tail wraps around paws.
pets.review: Slow cat stare with head lowering toward the work.

pets.name: Tabby
pets.locomotion: Short tabby trot, stripes compressing with each body squash.
pets.hoverOrJump: Compact pounce-hop with tail held straight for balance.
pets.workLoop: Paw taps twice, tail ticks once, eyes scan like tracking a cursor.
pets.waiting: One paw floats above the ground, frozen in curious attention.
pets.failed: Body loafs down and tail tip curls inward.
pets.review: Whisker-forward inspection with narrow eyes and steady tail.

pets.name: Merge Mammoth
pets.locomotion: Heavy trudge with body lag after each planted foot.
pets.hoverOrJump: Tiny massive hop; knees compress deeply and body barely leaves baseline.
pets.workLoop: Trunk pulls two attached strands together and smooths them into one path.
pets.waiting: Trunk holds an invisible conflict strand toward the user.
pets.failed: Trunk drops into a knot shape and tusks tilt down.
pets.review: Peers over a tusk while trunk traces an invisible diff boundary.

pets.name: CI Phoenix
pets.locomotion: Compact wing glides with tail flame kept attached to feather shapes.
pets.hoverOrJump: Rekindle hop: ember dip, flame-feather lift, brighter landing.
pets.workLoop: Flame-feather pulse travels from body to tail like checks progressing.
pets.waiting: Wings half-open like paused checks, ember tips steady but low.
pets.failed: Feathers dim into an ash hunch before one ember returns.
pets.review: One wing shields the eyes while the tail ember steadies on the result.

pets.name: Patch Panda
pets.locomotion: Soft roll-step, round body catching up after the paws.
pets.hoverOrJump: Round panda bounce with belly squash and controlled landing.
pets.workLoop: Paw presses an attached patch, smooths the edge, checks it, repeats.
pets.waiting: Holds a patch between both paws toward the user.
pets.failed: Patch pad peels halfway in paw and head lowers.
pets.review: Leans close to inspect the patch edge with one paw bracing.

pets.name: Test Tortoise
pets.locomotion: Deliberate shell-forward crawl; each foot lands with patient certainty.
pets.hoverOrJump: No jump spectacle; shell lifts a few pixels as legs push, then settles.
pets.workLoop: Shell panels tick through a test matrix while head checks each result.
pets.waiting: Head extends from shell and holds, asking for the next test target.
pets.failed: Head retracts halfway and shell dips.
pets.review: Head emerges fully and stares over the shell rim at final results.

pets.name: Diff Dragon
pets.locomotion: Serpentine body crawl with winglets folded tight to avoid clutter.
pets.hoverOrJump: Coiled spring lift; tail remains wrapped close.
pets.workLoop: Eyes scan in two columns while tail underlines an invisible changed line.
pets.waiting: Holds breath with cheeks puffed, waiting before it comments.
pets.failed: Wings fold over face and tail curl tightens.
pets.review: Snout tracks line by line; tail marks the exact review target.

pets.name: Queue Crab
pets.locomotion: Sideways crab shuffle, claws moving as counters.
pets.hoverOrJump: Small sideways hop with claws held level like queued jobs.
pets.workLoop: Claws alternate opening and closing as if pulling tasks from a queue.
pets.waiting: Both claws hold still at different heights like pending slots.
pets.failed: Claws droop, legs tuck under the shell, and the sideways queue posture collapses.
pets.review: One claw pinches an invisible item while eyes check it.

pets.name: Context Cat
pets.locomotion: Long stretchy cat walk; body elongates then gathers.
pets.hoverOrJump: Stretch-pounce with tail drawing the body back into shape.
pets.workLoop: Curls around an invisible context window, tail measuring the boundary.
pets.waiting: Sleeps with one eye open and tail guarding context.
pets.failed: Overfull curl collapses into a tangled loaf.
pets.review: Uncurls just enough to inspect, then rewraps around the result.

pets.name: Prompt Parrot
pets.locomotion: Perch shuffle with beak leading and tail feathers balancing.
pets.hoverOrJump: Short perch flap with beak opening but no text bubble.
pets.workLoop: Beak opens and closes in measured beats while feathers reorder like prompt clauses.
pets.waiting: Head cocks sharply, waiting to echo the next instruction.
pets.failed: Feathers ruffle and beak closes tight.
pets.review: Beak points down and eye tracks the prompt shape.

pets.name: Build Bot
pets.locomotion: Treadless mechanical step with torso gyroscope correction.
pets.hoverOrJump: Piston hop; body rises on tiny actuator compression.
pets.workLoop: Chest panel bars fill in sequence while arms lock and release.
pets.waiting: One antenna freezes in input-ready position.
pets.failed: Chest panel dims and one arm hangs loose.
pets.review: Head lens zooms forward while arms brace at sides.

pets.name: Cache Squirrel
pets.locomotion: Fast stash-and-scamper with tail stabilizing every stop.
pets.hoverOrJump: Acorn-hop where paws tuck close and tail flips forward.
pets.workLoop: Paws place tiny attached cache blocks into tail fur pockets.
pets.waiting: Clutches one cache block and looks for confirmation.
pets.failed: Drops into a startled crouch with tail wrapped around stash.
pets.review: Sniffs a cache block, then nods with tail held high.

pets.name: Latency Lemur
pets.locomotion: Quick alert hops with striped tail acting like a timing graph.
pets.hoverOrJump: Vertical reaction hop; tail whips into a latency spike shape.
pets.workLoop: Tail ticks through p50, p95, p99-like heights without drawing labels.
pets.waiting: Eyes widen and tail freezes at a mid-height measurement.
pets.failed: Tail droops into a long slow curve.
pets.review: Leans forward, tail held straight as a measured baseline.

pets.name: Trace Manta
pets.locomotion: Smooth manta glide; fins ripple like spans flowing downstream.
pets.hoverOrJump: No jump; a soft upward glide and banking turn.
pets.workLoop: Attached fin lines ripple in ordered waves as if following a trace.
pets.waiting: Hovers flat with fins paused halfway through a ripple.
pets.failed: One fin folds unevenly and body dips.
pets.review: Banks to expose one fin edge like a highlighted span.

pets.name: Log Lynx
pets.locomotion: Quiet prowling steps; ear tufts twitch before direction changes.
pets.hoverOrJump: Silent pounce-hop with shoulders leading.
pets.workLoop: Eyes scan horizontally, ears triangulate, paw pauses on an invisible log line.
pets.waiting: One ear points at the user while the body stays low.
pets.failed: Ears flatten and tail lashes once.
pets.review: Nose lowers to the exact invisible line and eyes narrow.

pets.name: Database Mole
pets.locomotion: Burrow-like shuffle with nose and paws leading under the body.
pets.hoverOrJump: Small pop-up from burrow posture; paws stay close.
pets.workLoop: Paws pack attached row-like blocks into neat layers.
pets.waiting: Nose emerges first and pauses for migration approval.
pets.failed: Backs into the burrow posture with paws covering face.
pets.review: Sniffs a schema layer and taps twice with one paw.

pets.name: Fixture Fox
pets.locomotion: Clever fox trot with tail carrying small attached fixture shapes.
pets.hoverOrJump: Quick fox bound; tail tucks fixtures close midair.
pets.workLoop: Arranges attached sample blocks with paws, then checks their order.
pets.waiting: Holds one fixture block in paw, ears forward.
pets.failed: Tail spills inward around the body and ears tilt back.
pets.review: Nose points from fixture to fixture in a verification rhythm.

pets.name: Type Terrier
pets.locomotion: Energetic terrier trot with ears snapping to type errors.
pets.hoverOrJump: Short eager hop where front paws lift like spotting an error.
pets.workLoop: Paws dig at an invisible type mismatch, then ears perk when resolved.
pets.waiting: Sits sharply, waiting for which overload to choose.
pets.failed: Ears droop asymmetrically and tail freezes.
pets.review: Nose points at one invisible type edge while paw holds position.

pets.name: Python Pangolin
pets.locomotion: Armored curl-unroll walk, scales rippling from head to tail.
pets.hoverOrJump: Curls into a ball, lifts slightly, unrolls into landing.
pets.workLoop: Scales flip in indentation-like steps while claws make tiny edits.
pets.waiting: Half-curled posture, one eye visible, waiting for import direction.
pets.failed: Rolls into a protective ball with only the snout visible, refusing the broken cell.
pets.review: Uncurls just enough to inspect scale alignment.

pets.name: Borrow Badger
pets.locomotion: Low determined badger trot; shoulders lead while the tail keeps an ownership ledger rhythm.
pets.hoverOrJump: Grounded dig-hop; front paws compress, body lifts only a little, then lands braced.
pets.workLoop: Paws pass an attached token-shaped pebble from one side to the other, then tuck it back against the body.
pets.waiting: Holds two paw positions apart as if asking which reference gets access.
pets.failed: Paws cross over the pebble and the shoulders hunch into a blocked borrow posture.
pets.review: Nose follows a tight lifetime arc near the chest while one paw guards the pebble.

pets.name: Goroutine Gecko
pets.locomotion: Sticky-toe sprint with tiny parallel footfalls that feel coordinated, not frantic.
pets.hoverOrJump: Concurrent toe-pop; front toes lift in sequence, tail balances, then all feet settle together.
pets.workLoop: Back spots pulse in staggered lanes while toes tap through parallel service checks.
pets.waiting: Freezes with one toe raised and tail held like a paused channel.
pets.failed: Toes splay in mismatched timing and the tail drops out of sync.
pets.review: Head pivots between two body spots as if checking handoff order.

pets.name: React Gecko
pets.locomotion: Wall-crawl steps with sticky toes landing one at a time.
pets.hoverOrJump: Sticky-toe leap; tail stabilizes before feet land.
pets.workLoop: Color patches on body reorder like component state transitions.
pets.waiting: Freezes with one toe lifted, waiting for state input.
pets.failed: Tail drops, toes splay wide, and the gecko sticks flat like state escaped it.
pets.review: Head tilts at a component boundary while toes brace.

pets.name: Design Finch
pets.locomotion: Tiny precise hops like moving between layout breakpoints.
pets.hoverOrJump: Light finch hop with wing tips aligning at peak.
pets.workLoop: Wing tips measure invisible spacing, beak nudges alignment.
pets.waiting: Balances on one foot, waiting for visual decision.
pets.failed: Feathers fluff unevenly like broken spacing.
pets.review: Beak points along an invisible baseline.

pets.name: Pixel Penguin
pets.locomotion: Waddle with square pixel-step rhythm.
pets.hoverOrJump: Tiny belly-hop; flippers hold close.
pets.workLoop: Flippers tap in alternating server-check rhythm.
pets.waiting: Stands upright with flippers tucked like awaiting sudo.
pets.failed: Slides down into a small seated slump.
pets.review: Head lowers and one flipper points at invisible config.

pets.name: Container Hermit
pets.locomotion: Sideways shell shuffle; legs move fast while the modular shell stays readable.
pets.hoverOrJump: Tiny shell-lift where the whole service stack rises as one protected unit.
pets.workLoop: Shell panels open and close in attached compartments as services start, stop, and settle.
pets.waiting: Half-hides inside the shell with one claw holding a stable compartment open.
pets.failed: Shell panels misalign and the crab tucks halfway inside.
pets.review: Turns the shell side-on so the compartment order is visible.

pets.name: Cluster Puffer
pets.locomotion: Small buoyant drift with fins correcting position like a scheduler balancing load.
pets.hoverOrJump: Inflate-lift; body rounds gently, rises, then deflates back to baseline.
pets.workLoop: Body spots inflate in balanced groups as if pods are being placed across nodes.
pets.waiting: Holds three spots half-inflated, asking where capacity should go.
pets.failed: Inflation becomes lopsided and the fins tuck close.
pets.review: Rolls slightly to expose one balanced group of spots for inspection.

pets.name: Release Rocket
pets.locomotion: Controlled hover-slide with fins steering, no detached exhaust.
pets.hoverOrJump: Launch bob: body compresses down, rises on attached flame shape, settles.
pets.workLoop: Fins check sequence, attached flame pulses in checklist cadence.
pets.waiting: Rocket holds on launchpad posture, nose angled at user.
pets.failed: Nose dips and flame shrinks into body.
pets.review: Tilts to inspect final checklist with fins locked.

pets.name: Incident Axolotl
pets.locomotion: Gentle amphibian steps; frills pulse like calm breathing.
pets.hoverOrJump: Soft waterless bounce with frills folding in and out.
pets.workLoop: Frills pulse slowly while paws move through response steps.
pets.waiting: Holds steady eye contact with frills low, asking for escalation choice.
pets.failed: Frills droop but posture stays composed.
pets.review: Head lowers and frills align symmetrically.

pets.name: Docs Jelly
pets.locomotion: Floating bell pulse with tendrils trailing like paragraphs.
pets.hoverOrJump: No jump; upward bell contraction and soft descent.
pets.workLoop: Tendrils align into neat rows, then relax.
pets.waiting: Bell pauses mid-pulse, tendrils held in unfinished line.
pets.failed: Tendrils tangle and bell flattens slightly.
pets.review: Bell tilts and tendrils underline an invisible sentence.

pets.name: Search Salmon
pets.locomotion: Upstream swimming motion through air; tail beats are search steps.
pets.hoverOrJump: Leaps in a clean arc, tail flicking at peak.
pets.workLoop: Nose darts between invisible results while tail keeps cadence.
pets.waiting: Suspends mid-swim, eyes on user for query refinement.
pets.failed: Tail beat slows and body dips downstream.
pets.review: Turns sideways to inspect one result closely.

pets.name: Refactor Rabbit
pets.locomotion: Quick tidy hops, landing in progressively cleaner posture.
pets.hoverOrJump: High rabbit hop with ears folding back, then snapping upright.
pets.workLoop: Paws rearrange attached code-block shapes into cleaner stacks.
pets.waiting: Sits upright with ears split in two option directions.
pets.failed: Ears flop, body crouches, and the quick refactor energy drains into a paused coil.
pets.review: Nose twitches over one cleaned block.

pets.name: Schema Snail
pets.locomotion: Slow glide; shell bands rotate like version numbers.
pets.hoverOrJump: No true jump; shell lifts a little as body stretches forward.
pets.workLoop: Shell bands align one notch at a time.
pets.waiting: Eyestalks extend toward the user for migration approval.
pets.failed: Eyestalks retract and shell tilts.
pets.review: One eyestalk inspects shell-band alignment.

pets.name: Product Crane
pets.locomotion: Deliberate roadmap steps with wing tabs trailing like reordered priorities.
pets.hoverOrJump: Graceful one-leg lift, wing tabs tucked at peak.
pets.workLoop: Head scans, wing tabs reorder, body gives one decisive nod.
pets.waiting: Extends a tabbed wing toward the user for prioritization input.
pets.failed: Wing tabs fall out of alignment and neck lowers.
pets.review: Neck forms a traceable inspection line while tabs lock into final order.

pets.name: Roadmap Raven
pets.locomotion: Measured hops with tail feathers spreading like timeline lanes.
pets.hoverOrJump: Low raven hop, wings held as dark planning brackets.
pets.workLoop: Tail feathers reorder from near to far priorities.
pets.waiting: Beak holds still over the next invisible milestone.
pets.failed: Feathers ruffle out of sequence and the planning stare loses its confident angle.
pets.review: One eye tracks the timeline from left to right.

pets.name: Meeting Moth
pets.locomotion: Soft flutter around an invisible note line.
pets.hoverOrJump: Wingbeat lift with antennae staying aimed at the speaker.
pets.workLoop: Wings open and close in turn-taking rhythm, antennae capturing the thread.
pets.waiting: Pauses mid-flutter as if waiting for the next speaker.
pets.failed: Wings fold down and antennae droop.
pets.review: Antennae align and wings flatten like summarizing a transcript.

pets.name: Approval Alpaca
pets.locomotion: Gentle step with long neck leading and wool bouncing.
pets.hoverOrJump: Small woolly hop, neck staying dignified.
pets.workLoop: Wool puffs pulse while neck checks between two invisible choices.
pets.waiting: Long neck stretches toward user, ears forward, holding patient posture.
pets.failed: Wool flattens and ears angle outward.
pets.review: Neck bends down into careful sign-off inspection.

pets.name: Sandbox Seal
pets.locomotion: Belly scoot with flippers steering a safe test zone.
pets.hoverOrJump: Playful flipper bounce, compact and low.
pets.workLoop: Flippers pat an invisible sandbox boundary into shape.
pets.waiting: Balances upright, flippers tucked, asking to proceed.
pets.failed: Flops sideways with whiskers flattened, blinking at the escaped experiment.
pets.review: Nose checks the sandbox edge while flippers hold position.

pets.name: Notebook Newt
pets.locomotion: Small careful crawl, tail drawing cell-like beats.
pets.hoverOrJump: Tiny lab-hop with tail curling under.
pets.workLoop: Tail marks cell execution order while head checks result shapes.
pets.waiting: Stops between two invisible cells, head raised.
pets.failed: Tail curls into a small error knot.
pets.review: Head lowers to inspect the output cell boundary.

pets.name: Security Sentinel
pets.locomotion: Guard-like step with shield-like body angle, no weapon props required.
pets.hoverOrJump: Controlled guard hop, body never losing defensive silhouette.
pets.workLoop: Body pivots through threat-boundary angles while eyes scan.
pets.waiting: Holds a checkpoint posture until risk choice is made.
pets.failed: Shield posture cracks inward and head lowers.
pets.review: Locks into a narrow inspection stance at a trust boundary.

pets.name: Migration Mantis
pets.locomotion: Precise mantis steps, forearms folding and unfolding like migration stages.
pets.hoverOrJump: Angular mantis hop with forearms tucked close.
pets.workLoop: Forearms move one attached block from old side to new side.
pets.waiting: Holds both forearms apart, waiting to cut over.
pets.failed: Forearms cross, body hunches, and the migration cutover pose locks up.
pets.review: Forearm tip traces the new path with surgical focus.

pets.name: Demo Dolphin
pets.locomotion: Smooth air-swim with nose leading like a presenter.
pets.hoverOrJump: Demo arc: graceful leap, tail tuck, confident landing posture.
pets.workLoop: Nose points through invisible story beats while fin gestures stay attached.
pets.waiting: Hovers with one fin held in 'ready to show' posture.
pets.failed: Nose dips, fins fold close, and the demo arc sinks without a splash effect.
pets.review: Turns side-on as if presenting the final outcome.
